title: heteropyxis dehniae
intro: Heteropyxis dehniae, also known as the 'Marula Bush', is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is traditionally used in African medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Heteropyxis dehniae include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues, among other uses. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in water to create herbal preparations for various health concerns.
